memoryArtifacts.headline: 72425 Gossuin de Mons Male G6RR-Z64 Birth CHILDREN(8) Abt 1120

sibling.name: Nicholas de Mons, Bishop of Cambrai

km.Mons, Hainaut, Belgium: ម៉ូនស, ហាiណាuត, បែលហ្ស៊ិក
km.Baudour, Hainaut, Belgique: បាuដុuរ, ហាiណាuត, បែលហ្ស៊ិក

zh.lifeSummary: Gossuin de Mons III是Gossuin Mons II和Ida D’Ath的兒子，於大約1120年出生。他於1135年與Beatrice Rumigny結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1171年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gossuin de Mons III是Gossuin Mons II和Ida D’Ath的儿子，于大约1120年出生。他于1135年与Beatrice Rumigny结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1171年之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain.  Spanish Consuelo, Juan, Orestes, Valeria.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Mons.
Catalan: topographic name from the plural of mont ‘mountain’.

variants.name: Mantz
meanings: German: variant of   Manz   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

en.lifeSummary: Gossuin de Mons III was born about 1120 as the son of Gossuin Mons II and Ida D’Ath. He married Beatrice Rumigny in 1135. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. He died before 1171.

fr.lifeSummary: Gossuin de Mons III est né environ 1120, fils de Gossuin Mons II et Ida D’Ath. Il a épousé Beatrice Rumigny en 1135. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé avant 1171.

de.lifeSummary: Gossuin de Mons III wurde um 1120, als Sohn von Gossuin Mons II und Ida D’Ath geboren. Er hat 1135 Beatrice Rumigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er starb vor 1171.

it.lifeSummary: Gossuin de Mons III è nato il circa 1120 come figlio di Gossuin Mons II e Ida D’Ath. Lui sposato Beatrice Rumigny nel 1135. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì prima del 1171.

ja.Mons, Hainaut, Belgium: ベルギーヘイナトモンス
ja.Baudour, Hainaut, Belgique: ベルギーヘイナトバウドウル
ja.(Conde-Mons): ブラジルバヒアコンド
ja.lifeSummary: Gossuin de Mons IIIは約1120年にGossuin Mons IIとIda D’Athの息子として生まれた。1135年にBeatrice Rumignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1171年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gossuin de Mons III(은)는 대략 1120년 Gossuin Mons II(와)과 Ida D’Ath의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1135년 Beatrice Rumigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1171년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gossuin de Mons III nasceu aproximadamente 1120 filho de Gossuin Mons II e Ida D’Ath. Ele casou-se com Beatrice Rumigny em 1135. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1171.

ru.lifeSummary: Gossuin de Mons III родился около 1120 г. Его родителей звали Gossuin Mons II и Ida D’Ath. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice Rumigny в 1135 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Он умер перед 1171 г.

sm.Abt 1120–Bef 1171: e tusa o le 1120–a'e le'I oo le 1171

es.lifeSummary: Gossuin de Mons III nació aproximadamente 1120 como hijo de Gossuin Mons II y Ida D’Ath. Se casó con Beatrice Rumigny en 1135. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió antes de 1171.
